languages.text: {n}Cледуя {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}вашему совету{/d}, искалеченный человек сипло втягивает в себя воздух — раз, другой, третий. Его лицо становится чуть менее бледным, хотя зубы все так же судорожно сжаты.{/n}

{n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Cледуя {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}вашему совету{/d}, искалеченный человек сипло втягивает в себя воздух — раз, другой, третий. Его лицо становится чуть менее бледным, хотя зубы все так же судорожно сжаты.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

{n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

{n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}Deinem Rat{/d} folgend, ringt der verstümmelte Mann nach Luft ... einmal, zweimal, dreimal. Sein Gesicht nimmt wieder etwas Farbe an, aber er beißt weiter krampfhaft die Zähne zusammen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}Deinem Rat{/d} folgend, ringt der verstümmelte Mann nach Luft ... einmal, zweimal, dreimal. Sein Gesicht nimmt wieder etwas Farbe an, aber er beißt weiter krampfhaft die Zähne zusammen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Suivant {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}votre conseil{/d}, l'homme estropié inspire profondément, une fois, deux fois, trois fois. Si sa mâchoire demeure crispée, son visage reprend un semblant de couleur.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Suivant {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}votre conseil{/d}, l'homme estropié inspire profondément, une fois, deux fois, trois fois. Si sa mâchoire demeure crispée, son visage reprend un semblant de couleur.{/n}

languages.text: {n}遵照{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}你的建议{/d}，那残废的男人大口喘起气来——一下，两下，三下。他的脸上恢复了一丝血色，尽管牙齿仍下意识地咬得紧紧的。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}遵照{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}你的建议{/d}，那残废的男人大口喘起气来——一下，两下，三下。他的脸上恢复了一丝血色，尽管牙齿仍下意识地咬得紧紧的。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Siguiendo {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}tu consejo{/d}, el hombre mutilado coge aire. Primero una vez, luego otra y una tercera. Su cara recupera un poco de color, aunque sigue apretando los dientes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Siguiendo {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}tu consejo{/d}, el hombre mutilado coge aire. Primero una vez, luego otra y una tercera. Su cara recupera un poco de color, aunque sigue apretando los dientes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}切り裂かれた男が空気を吸い込む。顔面蒼白は少し和らいだが、歯はまだ痙攣している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mutilated man draws in air — once, again, again, again. His face is slightly less pale, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}Tavsiyelerine{/d} uyan sakat adam, nefes nefese kalıyor... Bir, iki, üç kez. Dişleri hâlâ spazmlı bir şekilde kenetlenmiş olsa da yüzüne biraz renk geliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}your advice{/d}, the maimed man gasps for air — once, twice, thrice. His face regains a hint of colour, though his teeth are still clenched convulsively.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Torture}Tavsiyelerine{/d} uyan sakat adam, nefes nefese kalıyor... Bir, iki, üç kez. Dişleri hâlâ spazmlı bir şekilde kenetlenmiş olsa da yüzüne biraz renk geliyor.{/n}
